name: Ulti-Mortar
effect_text: [Counter] DON!! -2 (You may return the specified number of DON!! cards from your field to your DON!! deck.): Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +2000 power during this battle. Then, draw 1 card. [Trigger] Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.  This card has been officially errata'd.
